homepage_directions.en: Image and Video Processing and Analysis

research.inferred_from_papers_note: 待从 Google Scholar 获取论文后由 LLM 归纳

summary.zh: 查正军，中国科学技术大学讲席教授、二级教授、博导，人力资源部部长、类脑智能技术及应用国家工程实验室执行主任。主要从事计算机视觉、图像视频分析、多模态智能理解与生成、具身智能感知与决策、神经形态视觉等方面研究。国家杰出青年科学基金获得者、国家优秀青年科学基金获得者。研究成果发表于一系列ACM/IEEE Trans. 及CCF A类会议论文，多次获得国际会议论文奖励，包括ACM Multimedia最佳论文奖、AAAI杰出论文奖等。
summary.en: Prof. Zhengjun Zha is a Chair Professor at USTC, Executive Director of the National Engineering Laboratory for Brain-inspired Intelligence Technology and Application. His research focuses on computer vision, image/video analysis, multimodal intelligence, embodied intelligence, and neuromorphic vision. He is a recipient of the National Science Fund for Distinguished Young Scholars.
